items.title: Emslie recalled by Scotland five months after giving birth
items.summary: Scotland have recalled Claire Emslie for next month's Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Israel, five months on from the forward giving birth.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Scotland suffer heavy ODI defeat by USA
items.summary: Scotland suffer a heavy defeat by USA as their Cricket World Cup League 2 trip to Nepal ends on a negative note.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: 'We are not even 15%': Virat Kohli's honest admission on Indian Hockey players' fitness standards
